nodes.name: Skema Aplikasi SPJ
nodes.label: Skema SPJ
nodes.description: Source schema file defining the SPJ application's core features: data entry, file uploads, bukti fisik, workshop, dokumen wajib, realisasi dana BOSP, and PR pengadaan.

nodes.name: Plan Frontend Blueprint
nodes.label: Frontend Blueprint
nodes.description: Frontend blueprint document defining the SPJ app's React + Vite + Tailwind CSS prototype with 9 routes, 8 sidebar items, page layouts, component hierarchy, and PDF generation approach.

nodes.name: Perbandingan Teknologi SPJ
nodes.label: Tech Comparison
nodes.description: Technology comparison document analyzing options for SPJ app: Supabase, VPS, SQLite, Google Apps Script, and Electron.

nodes.name: Panduan Arsitektur Deploy Laravel SPJ
nodes.label: Architecture Guide
nodes.description: Architecture guide document covering deployment options and system architecture decisions for the SPJ app.

nodes.name: Riset Arsitektur Dapodik eRapor
nodes.label: Dapodik eRapor Research
nodes.description: Research document analyzing Dapodik and eRapor architecture patterns for SPJ app design reference.

nodes.name: Login Authentication
nodes.label: Login Auth
nodes.description: Login authentication feature with NIP (18-char numeric) and password validation, inline error messages, and session management.

nodes.name: Pendataan Sekolah
nodes.label: Data Entry
nodes.description: Data entry feature supporting both manual form input and Excel file upload for BKU transaction records.

nodes.name: Upload Data
nodes.label: Excel Upload
nodes.description: Excel upload feature enabling users to import BKU transaction data from .xlsx files into the system.

nodes.name: BKU Transaction Table
nodes.label: BKU Table
nodes.description: BKU (Buku Kas Umum) feature for managing and viewing school financial transaction records with filtering and sorting.

nodes.name: Cetak Dokumen SPJ
nodes.label: Cetak Documents
nodes.description: Print/compile feature enabling users to generate official SPJ documents from BKU data with 17 template types and PDF export.

nodes.name: Dokumen Wajib
nodes.label: Wajib Docs
nodes.description: Dokumen wajib feature providing mandatory SPJ documents with SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH document variant switching.

nodes.name: Realisasi Dana BOSP
nodes.label: Realisasi BOSP
nodes.description: Realisasi dana BOSP feature for viewing and managing realisasi documents in tab-based Cover, Sekat, and Alur layouts.

nodes.name: Pengaturan Aplikasi
nodes.label: Settings
nodes.description: Settings feature with 4 tabs: Profil Sekolah, Data Master, Backup & Restore, and Tentang app information.

nodes.name: / (Landing Page)
nodes.label: Landing Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to / path, rendering the Landing page component.

nodes.name: /login (Login)
nodes.label: Login Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /login path, rendering the Login page component.

nodes.name: /dashboard (Dashboard)
nodes.label: Dashboard Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /dashboard path, rendering the Dashboard page component.

nodes.name: /data-sekolah (Data Sekolah)
nodes.label: Data Sekolah Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /data-sekolah path, rendering the Data Sekolah page component.

nodes.name: /data-guru (Data Guru)
nodes.label: Data Guru Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /data-guru path, rendering the Data Guru page component.

nodes.name: /bku (BKU)
nodes.label: BKU Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /bku path, rendering the BKU page component.

nodes.name: /bku/cetak/:id (Cetak)
nodes.label: Cetak Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /bku/cetak/:id path, rendering the Cetak page with dynamic transaction ID.

nodes.name: /dokumen-wajib (Wajib)
nodes.label: Dokumen Wajib Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /dokumen-wajib path, rendering the Dokumen Wajib page component.

nodes.name: /realisasi (Realisasi)
nodes.label: Realisasi Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /realisasi path, rendering the Realisasi page component.

nodes.name: /pengaturan (Pengaturan)
nodes.label: Pengaturan Route
nodes.description: React Router route mapping to /pengaturan path, rendering the Pengaturan page component.

nodes.name: LandingPage Components
nodes.label: Landing Page
nodes.description: Landing page with gradient hero section, 4 feature cards, about section, and responsive layout for unauthenticated users.

nodes.name: LoginPage Components
nodes.label: Login Page
nodes.description: Login page with animated gradient background, split layout, NIP + password form validation, and social login placeholder.

nodes.name: DashboardPage Components
nodes.label: Dashboard Page
nodes.description: Dashboard page showing overview statistics, BKU quick table, document status donut chart, and recent activity feed.

nodes.name: DataSekolahPage Components
nodes.label: Data Sekolah Page
nodes.description: Data Sekolah page for managing school profile and infrastructure data.

nodes.name: DataGuruPage Components
nodes.label: Data Guru Page
nodes.description: Data Guru page for managing teacher and staff data records.

nodes.name: BKUPage Components
nodes.label: BKU Page
nodes.description: BKU page displaying financial transaction records in a sortable, filterable data table with pagination and bulk actions.

nodes.name: CetakPage Components
nodes.label: Cetak Page
nodes.description: Cetak page providing a split-view layout for editing and previewing SPJ documents with multi-document card grid switching and PDF export.

nodes.name: DokumenWajibPage Components
nodes.label: Dokumen Wajib Page
nodes.description: Dokumen Wajib page displaying mandatory SPJ documents in a card grid with SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH toggle controlling which documents appear.

nodes.name: RealisasiPage Components
nodes.label: Realisasi Page
nodes.description: Realisasi page displaying realisasi dana BOSP documents in a tab-based layout with Cover, Sekat, and Alur tabs using card-based document design.

nodes.name: 17 BKU Utama Templates
nodes.label: 17 BKU Templates
nodes.description: 17 BKU document templates covering standard financial accountability documents, PR pengadaan, and rekening koran.

nodes.name: 6 Dokumen Wajib Templates
nodes.label: 6 Wajib Templates
nodes.description: 6 mandatory SPJ document templates controlled by the SIPLAH/non-SIPLAH toggle on the Dokumen Wajib page.

nodes.name: 3 Realisasi Templates
nodes.label: 3 Realisasi Templates
nodes.description: 3 realisasi document templates covering Cover, Sekat, and Alur layouts for dana BOSP reporting.

nodes.name: State Management
nodes.label: State Management
nodes.description: React Context or Zustand state management handling documents, bukti fisik, authentication, and UI state across the app.

nodes.name: UI State Patterns
nodes.label: UI Patterns
nodes.description: Collection of reusable UI state patterns: empty states, loading skeletons, error states, confirmation dialogs, and toast notifications with ASCII wireframes.

nodes.name: Card-Based Premium Design
nodes.label: Card Design System
nodes.description: Reusable card design system with gradient headers, hover effects, status indicators, and action buttons used across Cetak, Dokumen Wajib, and Realisasi pages.

nodes.name: Sidebar Navigation
nodes.label: Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Sidebar navigation component with 8 menu items, collapsible design (260px expanded, 72px collapsed), and active state gradient border.

nodes.name: 9+ Bukti Fisik Categories
nodes.label: Bukti Fisik
nodes.description: Bukti fisik management allowing users to upload and organize physical evidence photos linked to BKU transactions.
